<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/generate_tutorials_index.py — do not edit by hand -->

## Getting Started

| Notebook | What it shows |
|---|---|
| [Getting Started](../notebooks/Getting_Started.ipynb) | Introduction to the core `Series` and `GeoSeries` objects: loading data, exploring metadata, and visualizing time series. |

## Augmented KS Test

| Notebook | What it shows |
|---|---|
| [KS_Test_Validation](../notebooks/KS_test_Validation.ipynb) | Detect tipping points using the augmented KS test, showing p-value and D-statistic outputs, and evaluate detections against known events using precision, recall, and F1 score. |

## LERM

| Notebook | What it shows |
|---|---|
| [LERM_Validation](../notebooks/LERM_Validation.ipynb) | Detect regime shifts in paleoclimate time series using LERM (Laplacian Eigenmaps of Recurrence Matrices) and validate detections against known Dansgaard-Oeschger events. |

## Ruptures

| Notebook | What it shows |
|---|---|
| [Ruptures_Validation](../notebooks/Ruptures_Validation.ipynb) | Detect abrupt transitions in paleoclimate time series using change-point detection algorithms from the Ruptures library and validate results against known Dansgaard-Oeschger events. |
